text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, February 23. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
